capabilities: Develop a comprehensive output verification strategy that combines evaluation metrics with agent planning knowledge bases to validate software testing results effectively.

procedure.action: Capture system specifications using automated tools like Swagger or Postman to ensure comprehensive documentation using domain-appropriate tooling; assert error_count < 1 and result_valid = true; log operation_duration_ms and result_code to audit trail.

Assert captured specifications against business requirements using tools like JIRA or Confluence to ensure alignment by asserting all required fields conform to the schema definition; emit VALIDATION_FAILED with field path on the first failing field; assert field_validation_pass_rate >= 1.0.

Compose evaluation metrics from agent planning KB using data analysis tools like Pandas or NumPy to define success criteria by composing module interfaces via adapter pattern; assert input/output type contracts match before connecting; assert integration_error_count < 1 after contract validation.

Run automated test suites with tools like Selenium or JUnit to validate procedure outputs against defined criteria using domain-appropriate tooling; assert error_count < 1 and result_valid = true; log operation_duration_ms and result_code to audit trail.

Analyze test results using dashboards like Grafana or Kibana to identify discrepancies and ensure accuracy using domain-appropriate tooling; assert error_count < 1 and result_valid = true; log operation_duration_ms and result_code to audit trail.

summary: Establish a robust output verification strategy by integrating evaluation metrics with agent planning knowledge bases to ensure accurate software testing results.
title: Output Verification Strategy in Software Testing

failureConditions: Inaccurate test results due to misaligned specifications.
Undefined success criteria leading to ambiguous outcomes.
Failure to detect discrepancies in test outputs; this occurs when the operation proceeds without pre-condition validation, allowing malformed input to propagate and corrupt downstream state silently.
metrics: captured specifications against business requirements using tools like JIRA or Confluence to ensure alignment by asserti
input/output type contracts match before connecting
successConditions: All specifications are documented and validated against requirements
Success criteria are clearly defined and measurable
Test outputs consistently match expected results in automated test runs
